ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code where the school is located */,
  "district_code" INTEGER /* District code where the school is located */,
  "school_code" INTEGER /* School code */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., County Office of Education) */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., Elementary, High School) */,
  "charter_school_status" TEXT /* Charter school status (Y/N) */,
  "charter_school_number" INTEGER /* Charter school number */,
  "charter_funding_type" TEXT /* Charter funding type */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the school's website */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers */,
  "total_staff" INTEGER /* Total number of staff members */,
  "estd_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was established */,
  "grants_received" TEXT /* List of grants received by the school */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the school */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the academic year is the current one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "low_grade" INTEGER /* Low grade */,
  "high_grade" INTEGER /* High grade */,
  "enrollment_k_12" INTEGER /* Enrollment (K-12) */,
  "free_meal_count_k_12" INTEGER /* Free meal count (K-12) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  "male_students" INTEGER /* Number of male students */,
  "female_students" INTEGER /* Number of female students */,
  "non_binary_students" INTEGER /* Number of non-binary students */,
  "ethnicity_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing ethnicity data */,
  "special_needs_students" INTEGER /* Number of students with special needs */,
  "english_learners" INTEGER /* Number of English learners */,
  "students_with_disabilities" INTEGER /* Number of students with disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frpm_data" (
  "frpm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FRPM data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "frpm_count_k_12" INTEGER /* FRPM count (K-12) */,
  "percent_eligible_frpm_k_12" REAL /* Percent eligible FRPM (K-12) */,
  "male_frpm_count" INTEGER /* Number of male students eligible for FRPM */,
  "female_frpm_count" INTEGER /* Number of female students eligible for FRPM */,
  "non_binary_frpm_count" INTEGER /* Number of non-binary students eligible for FRPM */,
  "ethnicity_frpm_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing ethnicity data for FRPM */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frpm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frpm_data_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frpm_data_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages_5_17_enrollments" (
  "ages_5_17_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "enrollment_ages_5_17" INTEGER /* Enrollment (ages 5-17) */,
  "free_meal_count_ages_5_17" INTEGER /* Free meal count (ages 5-17) */,
  "total_students_5_17" INTEGER /* Total number of students aged 5-17 */,
  "male_students_5_17" INTEGER /* Number of male students aged 5-17 */,
  "female_students_5_17" INTEGER /* Number of female students aged 5-17 */,
  "non_binary_students_5_17" INTEGER /* Number of non-binary students aged 5-17 */,
  "ethnicity_data_5_17" TEXT /* JSON object containing ethnicity data for ages 5-17 */,
  "special_needs_students_5_17" INTEGER /* Number of students aged 5-17 with special needs */,
  "english_learners_5_17" INTEGER /* Number of English learners aged 5-17 */,
  "students_with_disabilities_5_17" INTEGER /* Number of students aged 5-17 with disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ages_5_17_enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ages_5_17_enrollments_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ages_5_17_enrollments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages_5_17_frpm_data" (
  "ages_5_17_frpm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FRPM data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "frpm_count_ages_5_17" INTEGER /* FRPM count (ages 5-17) */,
  "percent_eligible_frpm_ages_5_17" REAL /* Percent eligible FRPM (ages 5-17) */,
  "male_frpm_count_5_17" INTEGER /* Number of male students aged 5-17 eligible for FRPM */,
  "female_frpm_count_5_17" INTEGER /* Number of female students aged 5-17 eligible for FRPM */,
  "non_binary_frpm_count_5_17" INTEGER /* Number of non-binary students aged 5-17 eligible for FRPM */,
  "ethnicity_frpm_data_5_17" TEXT /* JSON object containing ethnicity data for FRPM for ages 5-17 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ages_5_17_frpm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ages_5_17_frpm_data_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ages_5_17_frpm_data_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certification_status" (
  "certification_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification status */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "certification_status" INTEGER /* Certification status */,
  "certification_details" TEXT /* Details about the certification status */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certification_status_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certification_status_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_options" (
  "educational_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational option */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "educational_option_type" TEXT /* Type of educational option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the educational option */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the educational option started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the educational option ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educational_option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_options_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nslp_provision_status" (
  "nslp_provision_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NSLP provision status */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "nslp_provision_status" TEXT /* NSLP provision status */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the NSLP provision status */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the NSLP provision status started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the NSLP provision status ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nslp_provision_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nslp_provision_status_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
